_comment: Node SSR (was a custom static export served from frontend/out). Set the Vercel project Root Directory to 'frontend' so the nextjs framework detects the app and serves it as SSR. Security headers are applied by the Next server itself (frontend/next.config.mjs headers()) so they hold on every host; the block below is retained as defence-in-depth on Vercel's edge.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' http: https: ws: wss:; worker-src 'self' blob:; manifest-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
